settings.title: Affiliate Disclosure
settings.body: How The Right Garment earns revenue and what that means for readers.

settings.title: What is an affiliate link?
settings.body: Some outbound links include tracking parameters. If a purchase follows, we may earn a commission at no added cost.

settings.title: Which links are affiliate links?
settings.body: Affiliate relationships are disclosed in-page where relevant. Not every external link is monetized.

settings.title: Does this affect editorial decisions?
settings.body: No. Inclusion and ranking are editorial decisions based on quality and relevance.

settings.summary: Some links on The Right Garment are affiliate links. If you click and purchase, we may earn a commission at no additional cost. Affiliate relationships do not determine inclusion or editorial language.
settings.cta_text: Questions about this disclosure? We are happy to clarify any relationship.
